API docs by Redocly

Wokelo API (1.0.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

Wokelo: support@wokelo.ai URL: https://wokelo.ai License: Proprietary

Wokelo's API suite is purpose-built for developers building dealmaking AI infrastructure. It delivers structured, processed intelligence at the quality standard investment and advisory workflows demand.

  • Entities resolved across a proprietary database of 20M+ public and private companies.
  • News signals deduplicated across 1,000+ curated sources.
  • Every output is agent-native, source-traced, and ready to plug directly into your models, agents, and workflows without additional processing.

Company Instant Enrichment

Instant fundamentals and alternative data on cached companies (20M+).

Generate deep intelligence for one or more companies / Enrich one or more companies

This endpoint dispatches to multiple behaviors based on the request body.

Mode: Company Deep Intelligence

Returns AI-synthesized company intelligence for one or more companies across the requested intelligence sections.

This endpoint supports use cases such as:

  • product and service intelligence
  • launch and roadmap tracking
  • strategic initiative analysis
  • partnership ecosystem mapping
  • revenue model and monetization analysis
  • customer base assessment
  • management profile synthesis
  • employee and product sentiment analysis

The request accepts one or more company identifiers, which may be permalinks or company URLs, and a set of supported deep intelligence sections.

Mode: Company Instant Enrichment

Returns structured company data for one or more companies across the requested sections.

Typical use cases include:

  • firmographic lookup
  • product catalog enrichment
  • funding and investor history
  • acquisitions and investments
  • headcount and traffic enrichment
  • AI-computed custom fields

The request accepts company identifiers (for example permalinks such as tesla-motors) and a list of sections to retrieve.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
One of
companies
required
Array of strings non-empty

List of company identifiers to analyze. The documentation shows both permalinks such as zendesk and URLs such as https://tesla.com.

sections
required
Array of strings (DeepIntelligenceSection) non-empty
Items Enum: "products_and_services" "product_launches" "strategic_initiatives" "partnerships" "business_model" "key_customers" "management_profiles" "employee_sentiment" "product_sentiment"

List of deep intelligence sections to generate.

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/enterprise/company/enrich/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "companies": [
    • "zendesk",
    • "freshworks",
    • "intercom"
    ],
  • "sections": [
    • "products_and_services",
    • "product_launches",
    • "strategic_initiatives"
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "request_id": "c2ad9d34-f432-4b9b-b5a2-46fbd124db5f",
  • "status": "COMPLETED",
  • "result": {
    • "zendesk": {
      • "firmographics": {
        • "name": "Zendesk",
        • "website": "http://zendesk.com",
        • "location": "San Francisco, United States",
        • "founded": 2007,
        • "type": "private",
        • "operating_status": "Acquired",
        • "ticker": "NYSE:ZEN"
        },
      • "CP enrichment": {
        • "products_and_services": {
          • "product_overview": {
            • "source": [
              • {
                • "id": 1,
                • "title": "Sourced from Wokelo Synthesis",
                • "url": "",
                • "publisher": "",
                • "date": ""
                }
              ],
            • "summary": "Overview of Zendesk products and services.",
            • "screenshot_url": "https://files.test.wokelo.ai/notebook/example/assets/example.png"
            },
          • "products_and_services": [
            • {
              • "product_area": "Customer Service AI Solutions",
              • "details": [
                • {
                  • "title": "AI Agents",
                  • "summary": "Autonomous AI-powered bots for customer support."
                  }
                ],
              • "sources": "1-3"
              }
            ]
          },
        • "product_launches": {
          • "product_launches_and_initiatives": {
            • "released_products": [
              • {
                • "date": "26-Mar-2025",
                • "initiative": "Resolution Platform",
                • "sources": [
                  • {
                    • "url": "https://www.prnewswire.com/example",
                    • "title": "Zendesk launches Resolution Platform",
                    • "publisher": "PR Newswire",
                    • "publishedDate": "2025-03-26"
                    }
                  ],
                • "summary": [
                  • "AI-powered resolution platform with workflow automation."
                  ]
                }
              ],
            • "future_announcements": [ ]
            }
          },
        • "strategic_initiatives": {
          • "strategic_moves": [
            • {
              • "Area": "Office expansion",
              • "Details": [
                • {
                  • "point": "Zendesk moved its headquarters to 181 Fremont Street.",
                  • "sources": [
                    • {
                      • "url": "https://therealdeal.com/example",
                      • "title": "Zendesk becomes latest tech firm to leave SF’s Mid-Market",
                      • "publisher": "The Real Deal",
                      • "publishedDate": "2024-11-12"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }
        },
      • "meta": {
        • "report_id": 1008951,
        • "title": "Zendesk - API Insights",
        • "user": "saish.kapadi@wokelo.ai",
        • "dt_createdon": "2026-04-06 07:16:56"
        }
      }
    }
}

Company Deep Intelligence

On-demand deep intelligence with custom parameters on any company.

Generate deep intelligence for one or more companies / Enrich one or more companies

This endpoint dispatches to multiple behaviors based on the request body.

Mode: Company Deep Intelligence

Returns AI-synthesized company intelligence for one or more companies across the requested intelligence sections.

This endpoint supports use cases such as:

  • product and service intelligence
  • launch and roadmap tracking
  • strategic initiative analysis
  • partnership ecosystem mapping
  • revenue model and monetization analysis
  • customer base assessment
  • management profile synthesis
  • employee and product sentiment analysis

The request accepts one or more company identifiers, which may be permalinks or company URLs, and a set of supported deep intelligence sections.

Mode: Company Instant Enrichment

Returns structured company data for one or more companies across the requested sections.

Typical use cases include:

  • firmographic lookup
  • product catalog enrichment
  • funding and investor history
  • acquisitions and investments
  • headcount and traffic enrichment
  • AI-computed custom fields

The request accepts company identifiers (for example permalinks such as tesla-motors) and a list of sections to retrieve.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
One of
companies
required
Array of strings non-empty

List of company identifiers to analyze. The documentation shows both permalinks such as zendesk and URLs such as https://tesla.com.

sections
required
Array of strings (DeepIntelligenceSection) non-empty
Items Enum: "products_and_services" "product_launches" "strategic_initiatives" "partnerships" "business_model" "key_customers" "management_profiles" "employee_sentiment" "product_sentiment"

List of deep intelligence sections to generate.

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/enterprise/company/enrich/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "companies": [
    • "zendesk",
    • "freshworks",
    • "intercom"
    ],
  • "sections": [
    • "products_and_services",
    • "product_launches",
    • "strategic_initiatives"
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "request_id": "c2ad9d34-f432-4b9b-b5a2-46fbd124db5f",
  • "status": "COMPLETED",
  • "result": {
    • "zendesk": {
      • "firmographics": {
        • "name": "Zendesk",
        • "website": "http://zendesk.com",
        • "location": "San Francisco, United States",
        • "founded": 2007,
        • "type": "private",
        • "operating_status": "Acquired",
        • "ticker": "NYSE:ZEN"
        },
      • "CP enrichment": {
        • "products_and_services": {
          • "product_overview": {
            • "source": [
              • {
                • "id": 1,
                • "title": "Sourced from Wokelo Synthesis",
                • "url": "",
                • "publisher": "",
                • "date": ""
                }
              ],
            • "summary": "Overview of Zendesk products and services.",
            • "screenshot_url": "https://files.test.wokelo.ai/notebook/example/assets/example.png"
            },
          • "products_and_services": [
            • {
              • "product_area": "Customer Service AI Solutions",
              • "details": [
                • {
                  • "title": "AI Agents",
                  • "summary": "Autonomous AI-powered bots for customer support."
                  }
                ],
              • "sources": "1-3"
              }
            ]
          },
        • "product_launches": {
          • "product_launches_and_initiatives": {
            • "released_products": [
              • {
                • "date": "26-Mar-2025",
                • "initiative": "Resolution Platform",
                • "sources": [
                  • {
                    • "url": "https://www.prnewswire.com/example",
                    • "title": "Zendesk launches Resolution Platform",
                    • "publisher": "PR Newswire",
                    • "publishedDate": "2025-03-26"
                    }
                  ],
                • "summary": [
                  • "AI-powered resolution platform with workflow automation."
                  ]
                }
              ],
            • "future_announcements": [ ]
            }
          },
        • "strategic_initiatives": {
          • "strategic_moves": [
            • {
              • "Area": "Office expansion",
              • "Details": [
                • {
                  • "point": "Zendesk moved its headquarters to 181 Fremont Street.",
                  • "sources": [
                    • {
                      • "url": "https://therealdeal.com/example",
                      • "title": "Zendesk becomes latest tech firm to leave SF’s Mid-Market",
                      • "publisher": "The Real Deal",
                      • "publishedDate": "2024-11-12"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }
        },
      • "meta": {
        • "report_id": 1008951,
        • "title": "Zendesk - API Insights",
        • "user": "saish.kapadi@wokelo.ai",
        • "dt_createdon": "2026-04-06 07:16:56"
        }
      }
    }
}

Industry Deep Intelligence

On-demand intelligence with custom parameters on any industry.

Generate deep intelligence for an industry topic

Returns AI-synthesized industry intelligence for a specific topic across one or more requested sections.

Typical use cases include:

  • market sizing and growth analysis
  • trend and innovation mapping
  • M&A and fundraising activity tracking
  • IPO transaction tracking
  • partnership landscape analysis
  • tier-1 curated intelligence synthesis
  • case study generation
  • regulatory environment review

Use topic to define the industry, and optional parameters to refine the scope with keywords, geography, custom definition, and sample companies.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
topic
required
string

Industry topic to analyze.

sections
required
Array of strings (IndustrySection) non-empty
Items Enum: "market_size" "quant_insights" "trends_and_innovations" "transactions_mna" "transactions_fundraising" "transactions_ipo" "partnerships" "tier1_intelligence" "case_studies" "industry_regulations"

List of industry intelligence sections to generate.

object (IndustryParameters)

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/enterprise/industry/enrich/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "topic": "Enterprise SaaS security",
  • "sections": [
    • "market_size",
    • "trends_and_innovations",
    • "transactions_mna"
    ],
  • "parameters": {
    • "keywords": [
      • "zero trust",
      • "SIEM"
      ],
    • "geography": [
      • "USA"
      ],
    • "definition": "B2B software focused on enterprise cybersecurity",
    • "sample_companies": [
      • "crowdstrike",
      • "sentinel"
      ]
    }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "request_id": "68555bdd-a11e-45df-97ab-a0cc6e6408a1",
  • "status": "COMPLETED",
  • "result": {
    • "IP enrichment": {
      • "market_size": {
        • "charts": {
          • "market_size_chart": {
            • "title": "Market Size Range",
            • "projection_year": 2034,
            • "period_start_year": 2024,
            • "period_end_year": 2034,
            • "data": [
              • {
                • "publisher": "Artificial Intelligence in Drug Discovery Market",
                • "company": "Reports and Data",
                • "currency": "USD",
                • "cagr": "17.5",
                • "end_year": 2034,
                • "start_year": 2024,
                • "start_value": {
                  • "value": 2.5,
                  • "multiplier": 1000000000
                  },
                • "end_value": {
                  • "value": 12.5,
                  • "multiplier": 1000000000
                  },
                • "estimated_value": {
                  • "value": 12.5,
                  • "multiplier": 1000000000
                  }
                }
              ],
            • "source": "Wokelo generated chart, extracted ranges from publishers, projections calculated based on estimated growth rates",
            • "note": "CAGR and projections calculated based on market size ranges",
            • "url": "https://files.test.wokelo.ai/notebook/example/assets/example/market_size_chart.png"
            }
          }
        },
      • "trends_and_innovations": {
        • "trend_and_innovations": {
          • "source": [
            • {
              • "id": 1,
              • "title": "Yahoo AI in Life Sciences Market",
              • "url": "https://finance.yahoo.com/news/example",
              • "publisher": "",
              • "date": ""
              }
            ],
          • "summary": "AI is transforming drug discovery through virtual screening, predictive modeling, and de novo drug design."
          }
        }
      }
    },
  • "meta": {
    • "report_id": 1009016,
    • "title": "AI in drug discovery - API Insights",
    • "user": "saish.kapadi@wokelo.ai",
    • "dt_createdon": "2026-04-08 18:47:45"
    }
}

Market Map

Ranked company discovery within a market category.

Generate a ranked market map of companies

Returns a ranked list of companies discovered within a market category.

Use topic to define the market or product category, and parameters to refine the search with a detailed query, keywords, sample companies, geography, company type, headcount, founding year, funding stage, and optional financial filters.

The response returns a ranked list of companies with firmographic, funding, and relevance commentary fields.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
topic
required
string

The market or product category to map.

object (MarketMapParameters)

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/enterprise/market-map/enrich/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "topic": "AI-powered CRM software",
  • "parameters": {
    • "detailed_query": "B2B CRM tools leveraging AI for sales automation",
    • "keywords": [
      • "AI",
      • "CRM",
      • "sales automation"
      ],
    • "sample_companies": [
      • "salesforce",
      • "hubspot"
      ],
    • "geography": [
      • "USA"
      ],
    • "company_type": "private",
    • "employee_count": [
      • "11-50"
      ],
    • "founded_year": {
      • "from": 2015
      },
    • "funding_stage": [
      • "Series A",
      • "Series B"
      ],
    • "total_funding": {
      • "from": "5000000"
      },
    • "last_funding_round": { },
    • "revenue": { },
    • "ebitda": { },
    • "net_income": { },
    • "ev_ebitda": { }
    }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "request_id": "a57a9100-e7e1-4c6c-9b29-cdd064516ba7",
  • "status": "COMPLETED",
  • "result": [
    • {
      • "Permalink": "esub-construction-software",
      • "Name": "eSUB Construction Software",
      • "Website": "esub.com",
      • "HQ City": "San Diego",
      • "HQ Country": "United States",
      • "HQ Continent": "North America",
      • "Founded": "2008",
      • "Type": "Private",
      • "Operating Status": "Operating",
      • "Product Category": "Construction Project Management Software",
      • "Core Offering": "Cloud-based project management solutions for subcontractors.",
      • "Product Catalog": "Construction Management Software, Project Management Tools",
      • "Employees (Crunchbase)": "51-100",
      • "Employees (LinkedIn)": 34,
      • "Funding Stage": "Series B",
      • "Total Funding": 22000000,
      • "Last Funding Date": "2023-05-01",
      • "Key Investors": [
        • "Autodesk",
        • "Revolution"
        ],
      • "Revenue": "",
      • "Ticker": "",
      • "EBITDA": "",
      • "Net Income": "",
      • "EBITDA Margin (%)": "",
      • "Net Income Margin (%)": "",
      • "EPS Diluted": "",
      • "ROA (%)": "",
      • "Unlevered FCF": "",
      • "D/E": "",
      • "Market Cap": "",
      • "Enterprise Value": "",
      • "EV/Revenue (LTM)": "",
      • "EV/EBITDA (LTM)": "",
      • "P/E (LTM)": "",
      • "Acquisitions": "",
      • "Investments": "",
      • "Overall Score": 7,
      • "Commentary": "Strong direct fit for field service management workflows."
      }
    ]
}

Target Screening

Scored acquisition targets for a defined acquirer.

Generate scored acquisition targets for an acquirer

Returns a ranked list of acquisition targets for a specified acquiring company.

Use company to identify the acquirer, and parameters to refine the target search using a detailed query, keywords, sample companies, geography, company type, headcount, founding year, funding stage, and financial filters.

The response includes ranking metrics such as overall score, query relevance, deal feasibility, deal precedent, and synergy potential, along with rationales.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
topic
string

Industry or product domain. Defaults to the product category of the acquiring company when omitted.

company
required
string

Permalink or URL of the acquiring company.

object (TargetScreeningParameters)

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/enterprise/target-screening/enrich/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "company": "microsoft",
  • "parameters": {
    • "detailed_query": "Looking for B2B SaaS companies in the cybersecurity space",
    • "keywords": [
      • "zero trust",
      • "endpoint security"
      ],
    • "sample_companies": [
      • "crowdstrike",
      • "sentinel"
      ],
    • "geography": [
      • "USA"
      ],
    • "company_type": "private",
    • "employee_count": [ ],
    • "founded_year": { },
    • "funding_stage": [ ],
    • "total_funding": { },
    • "revenue": { }
    }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "request_id": "f525ae70-b6aa-4b6e-b0af-c40efaf9681c",
  • "status": "COMPLETED",
  • "result": [
    • {
      • "Permalink": "postscript",
      • "Name": "Postscript",
      • "Website": "postscript.io",
      • "HQ City": "Scottsdale",
      • "HQ Country": "United States",
      • "HQ Continent": "North America",
      • "Founded": "2018",
      • "Type": "Private",
      • "Operating Status": "Operating",
      • "Product Category": "SMS Marketing Platform",
      • "Core Offering": "Postscript provides SMS marketing solutions aimed at ecommerce brands.",
      • "Product Catalog": "SMS marketing platform, AI-powered features for SMS",
      • "Employees (Crunchbase)": "251-500",
      • "Employees (LinkedIn)": 336,
      • "Funding Stage": "Series C",
      • "Total Funding": 106200000,
      • "Last Funding Date": "2022-06-15",
      • "Key Investors": [
        • "Beyond Capital",
        • "Twilio"
        ],
      • "Revenue": "",
      • "Ticker": "",
      • "EBITDA": "",
      • "Net Income": "",
      • "EBITDA Margin (%)": "",
      • "Net Income Margin (%)": "",
      • "EPS Diluted": "",
      • "ROA (%)": "",
      • "Unlevered FCF": "",
      • "D/E": "",
      • "Market Cap": "",
      • "Enterprise Value": "",
      • "EV/Revenue (LTM)": "",
      • "EV/EBITDA (LTM)": "",
      • "P/E (LTM)": "",
      • "Acquisitions": "",
      • "Investments": "",
      • "Overall Score": 7,
      • "Overall Score Rationale": "Strong strategic fit and product synergies offset by significant financial stretch and integration complexity for this scale of acquisition.",
      • "Commentary": "Postscript acquisition would eliminate Klaviyo's primary SMS competitor while adding superior AI-powered automation and deliverability infrastructure.",
      • "Query Relevance Score": 9,
      • "Query Relevance Rationale": "Postscript directly provides SMS marketing and push notification infrastructure.",
      • "Deal Feasibility Score": 3,
      • "Deal Feasibility Rationale": "Target valuation likely represents substantial financial stretch.",
      • "Deal Precedent Score": 6,
      • "Deal Precedent Rationale": "Similar marketing automation focus, though larger than prior acquisitions.",
      • "Synergy Potential Score": 8,
      • "Synergy Potential Rationale": "Strong SMS platform integration and cross-sell potential."
      }
    ]
}

Buyer Screening

Scored buyers for a defined target company.

Generate scored buyers for a target company

Returns a ranked list of potential buyers for a specified target company.

Use company to identify the target company, and parameters to refine the buyer search using a descriptive query, buyer type, company type, and geographic scope.

The response includes firmographic and financial information for candidate buyers, along with ranking metrics such as overall score, deal feasibility, product synergy, deal precedent, and synergy potential where available.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
company
required
string

Permalink or URL of the target company.

object (BuyerScreeningParameters)

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/enterprise/buyer-screening/enrich/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "company": "acme-security",
  • "parameters": {
    • "detailed_query": "Looking for strategic acquirers in enterprise software",
    • "buyer_type": [
      • "strategic"
      ],
    • "company_type": "public",
    • "geography": [
      • "USA"
      ]
    }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "request_id": "c685171e-ce46-474b-b0de-f17123b3085a",
  • "status": "COMPLETED",
  • "result": [
    • {
      • "Permalink": "wright-express",
      • "Name": "Wex",
      • "Website": "wexinc.com",
      • "HQ City": "Portland",
      • "HQ Country": "United States",
      • "HQ Continent": "North America",
      • "Founded": "1983",
      • "Type": "Public",
      • "Operating Status": "IPO",
      • "Buyer Type": "Strategic",
      • "Product Category": "Financial technology solutions",
      • "Core Offering": "WEX provides financial technology solutions for payment processing, employee benefits, fleet management, and corporate payments.",
      • "Product Catalog": "Fuel Cards, Business Payments Solutions, Employee Benefits Platforms",
      • "Employees (Crunchbase)": "5001-10000",
      • "Employees (LinkedIn)": 4981,
      • "Funding Stage": "",
      • "Total Funding": "",
      • "Last Funding Date": "",
      • "Key Investors": [
        • "Warburg Pincus"
        ],
      • "Revenue": 2660800000,
      • "Ticker": "NYSE:WEX",
      • "EBITDA": 874400000,
      • "Net Income": 304100000,
      • "EBITDA Margin (%)": 32.8622,
      • "Net Income Margin (%)": 11.4288,
      • "EPS Diluted": 8.47,
      • "ROA (%)": 3.0387,
      • "Unlevered FCF": 1249487500,
      • "D/E": 398.6958,
      • "Market Cap": 5158944522,
      • "Enterprise Value": 4842144522,
      • "EV/Revenue (LTM)": 1.819808,
      • "EV/EBITDA (LTM)": 5.537677,
      • "P/E (LTM)": 17.752066,
      • "Acquisitions": "Payzer (2023), Benefitexpress (2021)",
      • "Investments": "",
      • "Overall Score": 9,
      • "Overall Score Rationale": "Strong strategic fit with product adjacency and proven M&A capability.",
      • "Commentary": "WEX's business payments suite and acquisition track record position it as a strong strategic buyer.",
      • "Deal Feasibility Score": 8,
      • "Deal Feasibility Rationale": "Revenue and EBITDA profile provide capacity for a transaction of this size.",
      • "Product Synergy Score": 9,
      • "Product Synergy Rationale": "Target extends existing business payments and spend management workflows.",
      • "Deal Precedent Score": 9,
      • "Deal Precedent Rationale": "Prior acquisitions in payments and benefits demonstrate relevant precedent.",
      • "Synergy Potential Score": 8,
      • "Synergy Potential Rationale": "Cross-sell and workflow integration opportunities are strong."
      }
    ]
}

Company News Monitoring

News retrieval, enrichment, and filtering for a specific company.

Fetch company news articles

Returns recent news articles for a specified company, enriched with AI-generated summaries, event categories, metadata, and scraped article text.

Supports filtering by date range, category, publisher allowlist, publisher blacklist, pagination, and result limit.

Note: the documentation examples encode some multi-value filters directly into query strings. This spec models those filters conservatively as strings rather than assuming a repeated-parameter or array-based wire format.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
company
required
string
Example: company=tesla

Company permalink or identifier to monitor.

blacklisted
string
Example: blacklisted=https://www.prnewswire.com/

Blacklisted publisher URL or encoded value. Documentation shows URL-encoded string input rather than a formally typed array.

limit
integer >= 1
Default: 100
Example: limit=100

Maximum number of results to return.

start_date
string <date>
Example: start_date=2025-01-01

Start date filter in YYYY-MM-DD format.

end_date
string <date>
Example: end_date=2026-03-15

End date filter in YYYY-MM-DD format.

category
string
Example: category=PARTNERSHIPS

News category filter. Documentation examples show comma-separated values in a single query string.

offset
integer >= 0
Default: 0

Pagination offset.

publishers
string
Example: publishers=https://www.bloomberg.com/

Publisher URL filter. Documentation shows URL string values in the query.

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/enterprise/company/news/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "success",
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "ai_summary": "Tesla Inc.'s energy division was granted a license to supply electricity in the UK.",
      • "type": "Partnerships & Alliances",
      • "url": "https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-03-12/tesla-s-energy-division-gets-uk-license-to-supply-electricity",
      • "title": "Tesla’s Energy Division Gets UK License to Supply Electricity",
      • "scraped_text": "Tesla Inc.’s energy division has been granted a license to supply electricity in the UK.",
      • "company_name": "Tesla",
      • "publisher": "bloomberg",
      • "published_date": "2026-03-12 07:55:50",
      • "source": "Wokelo",
      • "author": "Priscila Azevedo Rocha",
      • "countries": [
        • "GBR"
        ],
      • "sentiment": "Neutral",
      • "company_names": [
        • {
          • "name": "Tesla",
          • "website": "http://tesla-pa.com/"
          }
        ],
      • "primary_tag": "Partnerships & Alliances",
      • "original_language": "EN",
      • "secondary_tags": [ ],
      • "newsworthiness_impact": "Medium",
      • "primary_industry": "C&I Renewable Supply & Green Tariffs",
      • "secondary_industry": [ ]
      }
    ],
  • "count": 1,
  • "total": 1,
  • "limit": 100,
  • "offset": 0
}

Company Research

End-to-end company research report.

Start company research report directly

Starts an in-depth company intelligence report using the direct company primer endpoint.

Either website or permalink is required according to the documentation. industry is optional and may be auto-detected if omitted.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
industry
string

Optional company industry. Auto-detected if omitted.

website
string <uri>

Complete company website URL.

permalink
string

Company permalink identifier.

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/company_primer/v3/start/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "industry": "Artificial Intelligence",
  • "website": "https://wokelo.ai"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "Quick Snapshot": {
    • "Quick Snapshot": {
      • "quick_snapshot": {
        • "company_firmographics": {
          • "organization": {
            • "name": "Salesforce",
            • "logo": "https://wklogo.blob.core.windows.net/logos-thumbnail/salesforce.png",
            • "url": "https://app.wokelo.ai/dashboard/workflows/company-deep-dive-new-v2/?company=salesforce"
            },
          • "details": {
            • "industry": "Artificial Intelligence (AI), Cloud Computing, CRM, SaaS",
            • "founded_year": "1999",
            • "website": "https://www.salesforce.com",
            • "hq": "San Francisco, United States",
            • "operating_status": "active",
            • "company_type": "public",
            • "employees_in_crunchbase": "10000+",
            • "employees_in_linkedin": 87189,
            • "ticker": "NYSE:CRM"
            }
          },
        • "product_details": {
          • "product_category": "Cloud CRM Software",
          • "summary": "Salesforce provides a cloud-based platform for customer relationship management."
          }
        },
      • "sources": [
        • {
          • "id": 1,
          • "title": "Crunchbase",
          • "url": "",
          • "publisher": "",
          • "date": ""
          }
        ]
      }
    },
  • "Executive Summary": {
    • "Executive Summary": {
      • "summary": "Overview, strategic positioning, recent developments, and key capabilities."
      }
    }
}

Start company research report via workflow manager / Start a custom workflow / Start industry research report via workflow manager / Start peer comparison report

This endpoint dispatches to multiple behaviors based on the request body.

Mode: Company Research

Starts an in-depth company intelligence report using the workflow manager.

The documentation shows this endpoint being called with workflow: company_primer and a company permalink.

Mode: Custom Workflows

Starts a custom Wokelo workflow using the workflow manager.

The request must include a workflow identifier. Additional request fields depend on the selected workflow. For example:

  • industry_research___custom_a842447 uses industry_research_topic
  • value_creation_e469641 uses permalink

The response structure is workflow-specific and generally returns a nested research report or workbook-like JSON object.

Mode: Industry Research

Starts an end-to-end industry intelligence report using the workflow manager.

The documentation shows this endpoint being called with workflow: industry_primer and an industry field.

Mode: Peer Comparison

Starts a side-by-side peer benchmarking report for up to 5 companies.

The request uses the workflow manager with workflow: player_comparison and accepts a list of company websites plus an optional workbook name.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
One of
workflow
required
string
Value: "company_primer"

Workflow identifier.

permalink
string

Company permalink identifier.

website
string <uri>

Optional company website URL if supported by the workflow manager.

industry
string

Optional company industry.

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/workflow_manager/start/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "workflow": "company_primer",
  • "permalink": "salesforce"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "Quick Snapshot": {
    • "Quick Snapshot": {
      • "quick_snapshot": {
        • "company_firmographics": {
          • "organization": {
            • "name": "Salesforce",
            • "logo": "https://wklogo.blob.core.windows.net/logos-thumbnail/salesforce.png",
            • "url": "https://app.wokelo.ai/dashboard/workflows/company-deep-dive-new-v2/?company=salesforce"
            },
          • "details": {
            • "industry": "Artificial Intelligence (AI), Cloud Computing, CRM, SaaS",
            • "founded_year": "1999",
            • "website": "https://www.salesforce.com",
            • "hq": "San Francisco, United States",
            • "operating_status": "active",
            • "company_type": "public",
            • "employees_in_crunchbase": "10000+",
            • "employees_in_linkedin": 87189,
            • "ticker": "NYSE:CRM"
            }
          },
        • "product_details": {
          • "product_category": "Cloud CRM Software",
          • "summary": "Salesforce provides a cloud-based platform for customer relationship management."
          }
        },
      • "sources": [
        • {
          • "id": 1,
          • "title": "Crunchbase",
          • "url": "",
          • "publisher": "",
          • "date": ""
          }
        ]
      }
    },
  • "Executive Summary": {
    • "Executive Summary": {
      • "summary": "Overview, strategic positioning, recent developments, and key capabilities."
      }
    }
}

Industry Research

End-to-end sector coverage report.

Start industry research report directly

Starts an end-to-end industry intelligence report using the direct industry primer endpoint.

The request requires a specific industry name.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
industry
required
string

Specific industry name on which the report should be prepared.

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/industry_primer/v3/start/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "industry": "gaming"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "Executive Summary": {
    • "Executive Summary": {
      • "summary": {
        • "source": [
          • {
            • "id": 1,
            • "title": "Electronic Manufacturing Services Market Set to Reach USD 820.71 Billion",
            • "url": "https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/example",
            • "publisher": "",
            • "date": ""
            }
          ],
        • "summary": "The global EMS industry represents a critical segment of the electronics ecosystem."
        }
      }
    },
  • "Key Insights": {
    • "key_insights": [
      • {
        • "insight": {
          • "title": "Profit Centers Shift to Industrial & EV Segments",
          • "paragraph": "Profit pools pivot toward high-margin industrial and EV electronics.",
          • "sources": [
            • {
              • "id": 1,
              • "title": "Example source",
              • "url": "https://example.com",
              • "publisher": "",
              • "date": ""
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      ]
    },
  • "Overview": {
    • "Overview": {
      • "industry_overview_details": {
        • "summary": "Electronic Manufacturing Services represents a specialized industry where companies provide comprehensive manufacturing and supply chain solutions."
        }
      }
    }
}

Start company research report via workflow manager / Start a custom workflow / Start industry research report via workflow manager / Start peer comparison report

This endpoint dispatches to multiple behaviors based on the request body.

Mode: Company Research

Starts an in-depth company intelligence report using the workflow manager.

The documentation shows this endpoint being called with workflow: company_primer and a company permalink.

Mode: Custom Workflows

Starts a custom Wokelo workflow using the workflow manager.

The request must include a workflow identifier. Additional request fields depend on the selected workflow. For example:

  • industry_research___custom_a842447 uses industry_research_topic
  • value_creation_e469641 uses permalink

The response structure is workflow-specific and generally returns a nested research report or workbook-like JSON object.

Mode: Industry Research

Starts an end-to-end industry intelligence report using the workflow manager.

The documentation shows this endpoint being called with workflow: industry_primer and an industry field.

Mode: Peer Comparison

Starts a side-by-side peer benchmarking report for up to 5 companies.

The request uses the workflow manager with workflow: player_comparison and accepts a list of company websites plus an optional workbook name.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
One of
workflow
required
string
Value: "company_primer"

Workflow identifier.

permalink
string

Company permalink identifier.

website
string <uri>

Optional company website URL if supported by the workflow manager.

industry
string

Optional company industry.

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/workflow_manager/start/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "workflow": "company_primer",
  • "permalink": "salesforce"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "Quick Snapshot": {
    • "Quick Snapshot": {
      • "quick_snapshot": {
        • "company_firmographics": {
          • "organization": {
            • "name": "Salesforce",
            • "logo": "https://wklogo.blob.core.windows.net/logos-thumbnail/salesforce.png",
            • "url": "https://app.wokelo.ai/dashboard/workflows/company-deep-dive-new-v2/?company=salesforce"
            },
          • "details": {
            • "industry": "Artificial Intelligence (AI), Cloud Computing, CRM, SaaS",
            • "founded_year": "1999",
            • "website": "https://www.salesforce.com",
            • "hq": "San Francisco, United States",
            • "operating_status": "active",
            • "company_type": "public",
            • "employees_in_crunchbase": "10000+",
            • "employees_in_linkedin": 87189,
            • "ticker": "NYSE:CRM"
            }
          },
        • "product_details": {
          • "product_category": "Cloud CRM Software",
          • "summary": "Salesforce provides a cloud-based platform for customer relationship management."
          }
        },
      • "sources": [
        • {
          • "id": 1,
          • "title": "Crunchbase",
          • "url": "",
          • "publisher": "",
          • "date": ""
          }
        ]
      }
    },
  • "Executive Summary": {
    • "Executive Summary": {
      • "summary": "Overview, strategic positioning, recent developments, and key capabilities."
      }
    }
}

Peer Comparison

Multi-company comparative analysis across chosen dimensions.

Start company research report via workflow manager / Start a custom workflow / Start industry research report via workflow manager / Start peer comparison report

This endpoint dispatches to multiple behaviors based on the request body.

Mode: Company Research

Starts an in-depth company intelligence report using the workflow manager.

The documentation shows this endpoint being called with workflow: company_primer and a company permalink.

Mode: Custom Workflows

Starts a custom Wokelo workflow using the workflow manager.

The request must include a workflow identifier. Additional request fields depend on the selected workflow. For example:

  • industry_research___custom_a842447 uses industry_research_topic
  • value_creation_e469641 uses permalink

The response structure is workflow-specific and generally returns a nested research report or workbook-like JSON object.

Mode: Industry Research

Starts an end-to-end industry intelligence report using the workflow manager.

The documentation shows this endpoint being called with workflow: industry_primer and an industry field.

Mode: Peer Comparison

Starts a side-by-side peer benchmarking report for up to 5 companies.

The request uses the workflow manager with workflow: player_comparison and accepts a list of company websites plus an optional workbook name.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
One of
workflow
required
string
Value: "company_primer"

Workflow identifier.

permalink
string

Company permalink identifier.

website
string <uri>

Optional company website URL if supported by the workflow manager.

industry
string

Optional company industry.

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/workflow_manager/start/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "workflow": "company_primer",
  • "permalink": "salesforce"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "Quick Snapshot": {
    • "Quick Snapshot": {
      • "quick_snapshot": {
        • "company_firmographics": {
          • "organization": {
            • "name": "Salesforce",
            • "logo": "https://wklogo.blob.core.windows.net/logos-thumbnail/salesforce.png",
            • "url": "https://app.wokelo.ai/dashboard/workflows/company-deep-dive-new-v2/?company=salesforce"
            },
          • "details": {
            • "industry": "Artificial Intelligence (AI), Cloud Computing, CRM, SaaS",
            • "founded_year": "1999",
            • "website": "https://www.salesforce.com",
            • "hq": "San Francisco, United States",
            • "operating_status": "active",
            • "company_type": "public",
            • "employees_in_crunchbase": "10000+",
            • "employees_in_linkedin": 87189,
            • "ticker": "NYSE:CRM"
            }
          },
        • "product_details": {
          • "product_category": "Cloud CRM Software",
          • "summary": "Salesforce provides a cloud-based platform for customer relationship management."
          }
        },
      • "sources": [
        • {
          • "id": 1,
          • "title": "Crunchbase",
          • "url": "",
          • "publisher": "",
          • "date": ""
          }
        ]
      }
    },
  • "Executive Summary": {
    • "Executive Summary": {
      • "summary": "Overview, strategic positioning, recent developments, and key capabilities."
      }
    }
}

Custom Workflows

Trigger custom research workflows built in Wokelo.

Start company research report via workflow manager / Start a custom workflow / Start industry research report via workflow manager / Start peer comparison report

This endpoint dispatches to multiple behaviors based on the request body.

Mode: Company Research

Starts an in-depth company intelligence report using the workflow manager.

The documentation shows this endpoint being called with workflow: company_primer and a company permalink.

Mode: Custom Workflows

Starts a custom Wokelo workflow using the workflow manager.

The request must include a workflow identifier. Additional request fields depend on the selected workflow. For example:

  • industry_research___custom_a842447 uses industry_research_topic
  • value_creation_e469641 uses permalink

The response structure is workflow-specific and generally returns a nested research report or workbook-like JSON object.

Mode: Industry Research

Starts an end-to-end industry intelligence report using the workflow manager.

The documentation shows this endpoint being called with workflow: industry_primer and an industry field.

Mode: Peer Comparison

Starts a side-by-side peer benchmarking report for up to 5 companies.

The request uses the workflow manager with workflow: player_comparison and accepts a list of company websites plus an optional workbook name.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
One of
workflow
required
string
Value: "company_primer"

Workflow identifier.

permalink
string

Company permalink identifier.

website
string <uri>

Optional company website URL if supported by the workflow manager.

industry
string

Optional company industry.

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/workflow_manager/start/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "workflow": "company_primer",
  • "permalink": "salesforce"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "Quick Snapshot": {
    • "Quick Snapshot": {
      • "quick_snapshot": {
        • "company_firmographics": {
          • "organization": {
            • "name": "Salesforce",
            • "logo": "https://wklogo.blob.core.windows.net/logos-thumbnail/salesforce.png",
            • "url": "https://app.wokelo.ai/dashboard/workflows/company-deep-dive-new-v2/?company=salesforce"
            },
          • "details": {
            • "industry": "Artificial Intelligence (AI), Cloud Computing, CRM, SaaS",
            • "founded_year": "1999",
            • "website": "https://www.salesforce.com",
            • "hq": "San Francisco, United States",
            • "operating_status": "active",
            • "company_type": "public",
            • "employees_in_crunchbase": "10000+",
            • "employees_in_linkedin": 87189,
            • "ticker": "NYSE:CRM"
            }
          },
        • "product_details": {
          • "product_category": "Cloud CRM Software",
          • "summary": "Salesforce provides a cloud-based platform for customer relationship management."
          }
        },
      • "sources": [
        • {
          • "id": 1,
          • "title": "Crunchbase",
          • "url": "",
          • "publisher": "",
          • "date": ""
          }
        ]
      }
    },
  • "Executive Summary": {
    • "Executive Summary": {
      • "summary": "Overview, strategic positioning, recent developments, and key capabilities."
      }
    }
}

Company Search

Search and resolve company identifiers.

Search companies in the Wokelo database

Search the Wokelo database by company name, website, or ticker symbol to retrieve permalinks and key attributes used by other API calls.

If a company cannot be found in the Wokelo database, other APIs (except Monitoring API) can still use the full company website URL instead of the permalink.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
query
required
string
Example: query=wokelo

Search term such as a company name, website, or ticker.

search_by
required
string
Enum: "name" "website" "ticker"
Example: search_by=name

Field used to perform the search.

company_type
string
Enum: "all" "private" "public" "startup"
Example: company_type=all

Company type filter.

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/enterprise/company/search

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "success",
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "name": "Wokelo AI",
      • "permalink": "wokelo-ai",
      • "short_description": "Wokelo builds purpose-built AI agents...",
      • "founded_year": "2023",
      • "ipo_status": "private",
      • "hq": "Seattle, United States",
      • "website": "https://www.wokelo.ai/",
      • "ticker": "",
      • "country_code": "US",
      • "last_funding_round": "Seed"
      }
    ],
  • "count": 1
}

File Upload

Upload assets used by other workflows.

Upload files for research workflows

Upload proprietary files to Wokelo to supplement research reports with internal data.

Each uploaded file receives a unique identifier that can be referenced in custom workflow inputs. The documentation examples send multipart form data with repeated files parts plus a fileUUID JSON-string field.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: multipart/form-data
required
files
required
Array of strings <binary> [ items <binary > ]

One or more files uploaded as multipart form-data parts.

fileUUID
string

JSON-encoded array of UUID-like identifiers associated with the uploaded files.

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/assets/upload/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
multipart/form-data
{
  "fileUUID": "[\"k3m8n5p1q6\", \"a7f4b9e2c3\"]"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "success",
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "fileName": "k3m8n5p1q6",
      • "originalName": "lemonade_diligence.pdf"
      },
    • {
      • "fileName": "a7f4b9e2c3",
      • "originalName": "lemonade.pdf"
      }
    ]
}

Request Lifecycle

Check status, cancel, or fetch results of async requests.

Cancel an asynchronous request

Cancel a request that is already placed and currently in PENDING or PROCESSING state.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
request_id
required
string

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/enterprise/request/cancel

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "request_id": "5b8eff600-366f-465c-b795-68837043a2d3"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "success",
  • "request_id": "5b8eff600-366f-465c-b795-68837043a2d3"
}

Retrieve completed asynchronous request result

Retrieve the result of an asynchronous request after its status is COMPLETED.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
request_id
required
string
Example: request_id=d7a78d10-663a-493f-9b79-be1e6094f3bb

Unique request identifier.

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/enterprise/request/result/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "request_id": "d7a78d10-663a-493f-9b79-be1e6094f3bb",
  • "status": "COMPLETED",
  • "result": {
    • "data": { }
    }
}

Check asynchronous request status

Check the status of an asynchronous Enrichment, Insights, or Company Grid request.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
request_id
required
string
Example: request_id=b1f10ebf-a251-4e2d-b867-8482ac701987

Unique request identifier.

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/enterprise/request/status/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "request_id": "b1f10ebf-a251-4e2d-b867-8482ac701987",
  • "status": "COMPLETED"
}

Report Lifecycle

Check status of and download generated reports.

Download a completed report

Download a completed report in one of the supported export formats: pdf, docx, ppt, or json.

The documentation notes that ppt is only supported for company research and industry research reports.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
integer or string
file_type
required
string
Enum: "pdf" "docx" "ppt" "json"

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/assets/download_report/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "report_id": 109196,
  • "file_type": "json"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "report_id": 109196,
  • "file_type": "json",
  • "url": "https://api.wokelo.ai/downloads/report-109196.json"
}

Check report status

Get the status of a report created using workflow APIs such as Company Research, Industry Research, Peer Comparison, or Custom workflows.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
required
integer or string
Example: report_id=109196

Report identifier.

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/assets/get_notebook_status/

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "report_id": 109196,
  • "status": "COMPLETED"
}

Retrieve report configuration

Retrieve the settings originally used to trigger a report.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
integer or string

Responses

Production

https://api.wokelo.ai/api/wkl/notebook/configuration/

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "notebook_id": 103737
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "notebook_id": 103737,
  • "configuration": {
    • "workflow": "company_primer",
    • "permalink": "salesforce"
    }
}

Report Configuration

Configure and retrieve report metadata.
